title: Minimum Cost To Cut A Stick
description: Cut a stick at every distinct requested interior position; each cut costs the current segment length. Return the minimum total cost. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, cuts: list[int]. 2 <= n <= 1e6; 1 <= len(cuts) <= 100; cuts are distinct interior integer positions and may be reordered.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
